name: sqlrite-journal-demo
description: Remotion composition that stitches the journal app screenshots into the demo video (docs/demo.mp4 + docs/demo.gif).

scripts.render:mp4: npm run prep && remotion render Demo ../docs/demo.mp4 --codec=h264 --crf=18
scripts.render:gif: npm run prep && remotion render Demo ../docs/demo.gif --codec=gif --width=960 --height=540 --every-nth-frame=2 --frames=0-450
scripts.render: npm run render:mp4 && npm run render:gif
